scripts.build:heroes: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-core-hero-sprites.ps1 && npm run build:atlas && npm run build:data
scripts.build:items: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-item-icons.ps1 && npm run build:data
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm test && npm run balance && npm run benchmark && npm run release:check
